value: podman-compose is in .venv/bin/ (not system PATH). E2e tests need PATH=$PWD/.venv/bin:$PATH prepended when CONTAINER_ENGINE=podman, because podman compose looks for podman-compose as external provider. Use: PATH=$PWD/.venv/bin:$PATH CONTAINER_ENGINE=podman pytest tests/e2e -m e2e -q
